subject: [SO] 17.1.0 release
commit_message:
[SO] 17.1.0 release

- 1.18.0 images
- cnf-adapter (1.13.1 -> 1.14.0)
- cnfm-lcm (1.13.1 -> 1.14.0)
- etsi-nfvo (1.9.0 -> 1.10.0)
- liquibase bpmn camunda db init

Issue-ID: SO-4273
Change-Id: I5712016a2eb0cd1e4af84badb60ad686fa8b0a0d
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
